data.title: U.S. court initiates process for tariff refunds, Trump admin may appeal to halt billions in repayments.
data.description: The current administration under President Trump is expected to challenge the decision, as it intensifies efforts to impede or potentially prevent the reimbursement of billions in previous tariffs.

data.title: Medline Inc. prices secondary offering of 75M shares of Class A common stock at $41/share by major stockholders; underwriters may buy 11.25M more; offering expected to close on March 10.
data.description: Medline Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLN) in NORTHFIELD, Ill., has revealed the pricing details for a secondary offering of 75,000,000 shares of its Class A common stock by selling stockholders connected with Blackstone Inc., The Carlyle Group Inc., Hellman & Friedman LLC, and a subsidiary of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority. The shares are priced at $41.00 each for the public, with the underwriters given a 30-day option to buy up to an additional 11,250,000 shares. The offering is set to close on March 10, 2026, contingent upon meeting standard closing requirements.

data.title: Concerns rise as Meta's Ray-Ban Smart Glasses face scrutiny over privacy with regulators and advocates alarmed by sensitive footage use.
data.description: Regulators and privacy advocates are expressing concerns over Meta's smart glasses following an investigation. The device has raised worries due to the potential use of sensitive footage, with key figures highlighting the need for enhanced scrutiny. The issue has prompted discussions around privacy implications, with the development sparking widespread attention.
